channel.title: Software Engineer
channel.description: Personal site of Alex Rivera: software engineer, designer, and tinkerer.

item.title: Shipping Faster With Smaller PRs
item.description: How breaking work into tiny pull requests changed how my team ships.

item.title: Trailmap
item.description: An offline-first hiking companion with crowd-sourced trail conditions.

item.title: Rust for Pythonistas
item.description: A gentle on-ramp to Rust for folks who already love Python.

item.title: Lumen
item.description: A tiny CLI that turns your shell history into a personal knowledge base.

item.title: Designing With Tokens, Not Pixels
item.description: Why token-driven design systems scale better than ad-hoc styling.

item.title: FieldDeck
item.description: Lightweight image labeling tool for small ML datasets.
